111131.content:
It's been a while since Mobius has experienced peace. Its inhabitants could finally let out a sigh of relief and go back to a normal life.

As for Sonic, he wasn't too thrilled about this. With Eggman's prolonged disappearance and lack of robots to trash, the boredom started to set in for him.

Neverheless, he had to adjust to a new, not-so exciting life.

It's sunny outside. What should he do?
111131.title: Take a break, Sonic...

1111312.content:
"Nothing good will come out of sitting at home all day, let's hit the coast!" - Sonic stated.

Sonic opened the drawer and grabbed his favorite short, red swimming trunks with a tie rope in the middle of the waist line. Before heading out, Sonic decided to take a quick glance in the bathroom mirror to admire his looks.

After putting the trunks on...
1111312.title: Let's go hang out with friends on a beach!

11113121.content:
Sonic felt something off. The trunks, which used to fit perfectly, now applied a little bit of pressure on his midsection.

"Have they shrunk in a wash?" was the first thing that came to the hedgehog's mind.

The truth, however, was less convenient. After taking a better look in the mirror, Sonic found the culprit behind his tight briefs...

...it was his belly. Sticking out ever so slightly, but still pushing the trunks forward.

"I gained weight?" - he proclaimed in disbelief. "Only one way to be sure." He stepped on an electric scale, which made a slight cracking noise. After scrambling for a little while, the red numbers formed a sinister looking message:

"55 kg, +3 since last weigh in".

There was no denying it. This tiny dent on his stomach was indeed fat. Sonic pinched his sides where he could feel the muffin tops forming. After poking his tummy, he could feel the finger sink in deeper than usual. The whole experience was bizarre for him. He didn't remember ever being this soft.

Sonic kept poking and pinching his belly for a few more minutes, before snapping out of it. "I-I guess I have been snacking a bit lately... Whatever, it's hardly noticable at all and I'm still thin! I'll just burn it off!" - said disgruntled hedgehog, who just adjusted his tie ropes to make the trunks feel less tight and hide his side muffins.

"Right, the beach" - said Sonic before speeding out into Seaside Island.
11113121.title: ...Sonic felt something off...

111131211.content:
"Hey, had too many chili dogs lately? - Knuckles threw his head back and cackled, revealing his shiny, sharp teeth.
"Who needs a beachball when we have you?" - Tails joined in the mockery.

"I-It's not that bad!" - Sonic couldn't hide the embarrassment on his face, which turned red like a beetroot.

"Relax, we are just messing with you" - Knuckles patted Sonic's belly, which slightly bounced - "Just make sure to keep this in check, or else you will become the FAT-test thing alive!".

The entire group howled with laughter. After some short back and forth they went out to play some volleyball.

Sonic played more aggresively than usual, constantly being on the move in order to burn the calories. Knuckles noticed that and considered it a perfect opportunity to make yet another snide remark:
"That's right! One, two, one, two! Work that body!" - he laughed.
"Since when are you a comedian, Knux?" - the hedgehog replied, more than ever determined to show that smug needlemouse his place.

After the match, Sonic was dripping in sweat from all the exercise he had. His stomach was on fire and no doubt burning all this pesky fat. The comments about his weight have hurt his ego significantly and he was not going to tolerate this humiliation.
"I'll show 'em! Starting tomorrow, I'll start working out so hard, you will need a magnifying glass to find any lard on me!" Sonic sucked the air in, revealing his slight abs.

Suddenly, someone touched his back.

"Hey, Sonic!"

This caught him off guard and caused him to exhale all the air, reverting his toned look to a slightly rounded once again.

"Oh, Ames! I was just -"
"Checking on your ripped body? Not much to see here" - Amy giggled.

"Not you, too...Look, I'll lose it in no time-"

"Now, now, Sonikku. I think you look cute with a little jelly on the belly" - she whispered, as she put her hands on Sonic's waist.

Sonic turned red again.

"Say, wanna go with me to that new restaurant over there?" - she smiled with closed eyes, innocently.

"Oh, I..."
111131211.title: Sonic's friends tease him.

choices: ..."All you can eat" buffet... Oooooh no.
1111312111.content:
"Sure! Why not?"
"Yaaaay!" - Amy exclaimed and gave Sonic a warm hug. - "Let's go!"

And so, the two love birds headed out to the restaurant, still wearing their swimsuits. Because why not? Instead of looking straight forward, Sonic was staring at Amy's beautiful, green bikini decorated with a cute little ribbon on her waist. Her figure was flawless, one could tell she worked hard to achieve it for years, all with the purpose of getting Sonic's attention. He couldn't say no to her.

Still, the blue blur was contemplating if he made a right decision. Wasn't he supposed to be watching his weight? But he figured:

"Oh, well, I did say 'Starting tomorrow', didn't I? Besides, I deserve to treat myself after today's hard work. A little meal never hurt anybody."

After a short walk, they arrive at the place called...
1111312111.title: Sure!

choices: That was fantastic, time to leave!
Waiter has a surprise for the couple!
11113121111.content:
"'Freedom Patties', huh? Alright, let's go inside.

The moment Sonic opened the door, his muzzle was hit with an overwhelming aroma of burgers sizzling on the grill. Shortly, another wave of smell struck, filled with wings and fries cooked in butter. Absolute pleasure for nostrils.
It was at this moment Sonic's stomach decided to remind him of itself by letting out a loud growl. It has been a while since it was filled, and doesn't want to wait any longer. Not with so many delicacies at the arm's reach.

Amy chuckled after hearing the concert happening inside of Sonic's gut. The hedgehogs sat at the nearest free table and were quickly approached by a waiter:
"Hello, can I take your order?"
"Yeah, I'll take a sala-"
"We'll take 2 triple cheeseburgers, 2 large lard fries, 2 butterfat milkshakes and 2 double chocolate layered cheesecakes!" - Amy interrupted Sonic's futile attempt at keeping the day low carb.
"Alright, thank you!"

Sonic's jaw landed on the floor. How in the world is he going to eat all this? More importantly - how is Amy going to eat all this? Wouldn't that ruin her figure she worked so hard on?

"...What?" - Amy asked - "I know you're hungry. Besides, you deserve to indulge from time to time."
"Well, uh, that's not the point, what about you?"
"I'll be fine, Sonikku. Just sit back and enjoy the night. Ooh boy, I can't wait to taste it all!" - pure excitement could be heard in Amy's voice.

Her enthusiasm certainly was unusual, but it wasn't the only out of place thing he witnessed. After scanning around the restaurant with his eyes, he noticed that all the other folks sitting around were overweight. He recognized one of the customers - a fellow racoon girl - once skinny, now sporting a pretty hefty gut and binging on bacon sandwiches. Her rump was massive and jiggled heavily as she adjusted her seat. Sonic couldn't help but look at her for a while.

Thinking back, as of late quite a lot of people started plumping up. Plenty of new restaurants and buffets opening, with people enjoying their peaceful life and all the selection of food they were missing out while under the evil regime of Eggman. Probably enjoying it a little bit too much.
But Sonic wasn't going to let that happen to him! He was determined to keep his physique trimmed and athletic! And nothing was going to stop--

""Here is your order. Enjoy!"

Sonic's hands almost unscionsiously grabbed the giant burger and put them into his mouth.
"As I've said: Starting tomorrow".

He had trouble taking the first bite due to the size of this monstrosity, but managed to squeeze it and cram a big chunk of it into his face.

The taste blew him away, he could not believe someone could make a burger this good! The mix of spices and herbs gently caressed his tongue and the beef patty made his stomach feel ecstatic. And the butterfat shake was like drinking a cloud! Not to mention the lard fries - delicious! Sonic slowly chewed every bite of the burger, wanting to savor its taste for as long as possible. For a moment, he forgot about the calorie content of everything in front of him, he just wanted to eat... And eat... And eat...

With every gulp of the sugary and fatty goodness, his belly pushed forward, becoming more and more round and stuffed by the second. The muffin tops, due to the swimming trunks becoming increasingly tighter, started showing up again.

After finishing the main course, Sonic looked down at himself and saw his gut protruding in front of him, stuffed like a drum.
"Oh dear. It's okay though. It's just a one time thing" - he thought to himself.

He adjusted his seat and rope ties on his uncomfortably tight trunks to make some space for cheesecake still waiting for him. At first, he couldn't see it, because his gut was blocking the view.

Before reaching for it, he got the glance of Amy ravenously consuming her own piece. "She is already halfway in? Gotta pick up the pace, they don't call me the fastest for nothing!"

Sonic proceeded to shovel the cheesecake into his mouth. The puffy, creamy texture, glazed with a delicate milk chocolate melted in his mouth. It was like eating pure happiness. The happiness that would later store itself forever as adipose tissue.

After last bite, Sonic laid back on his chair and let out a sigh. Why do good things have to end so quickly? Amy finished right after him and looked up at the ceiling with her eyes half-closed.
"Worth it" she whispered, and then proceeded to rub her well-fed tummy.

"Worth it indeed" - Sonic replied. He felt his insides sloshing, digesting the gargantuan meal he just treated himself with.
11113121111.title: Freedom Patties.

111131211111.content:
"Time to get up and... Nnngh... Leave!" - uttered Amy as she struggled to get out of her seat. She hit the table with her round belly while positioning herself upright.
Sonic didn't have it any easier, the weight of all the food pushing him down. It was hard for him to retain balance because of the ocean made out of milkshakes and cheesecakes rocking him from left to right.

As they stood up, they both realised how much food they actually ate. Their stomachs were sticking out in front of them so far, they could barely reach them with their hands. The blue hedgehog thought this was embarrasing, but other customers didn't seem to pay much attention to it. Apparently, it's a norm here to stuff yourself, ready to pop.

The happy and overfed hedgies stepped out of the restaurant. It was already night time.
"Let's go... Or should I say... waddle... to my place? We are not far." - Amy suggested.
"Sounds good. Wow, that was so gooooood. I could go for seconds!" -Sonic held his stomach from below to prevent it from bouncing, too much.
"Right, and then you would explode." - Amy chuckled.

After reaching Amy's home, both hedgehogs ran to the bedroom (if you could call it running) with their bellies jiggling and then threw themselves at the bed, which loudly creaked.

"Oops, careful not to break it" - Amy let out a hearty laugh.

Finally, in the comfort of the cozy bed, Sonic and Amy could rest.

"We're both balloons. Are you sure you wanted to eat so much? - asked Sonic, visibly worried.
"I told you not to worry." - Amy calmed him down - "I know what I'm doing. Sleep tight, darling."
"You too, sweetie" - whispered Sonic, as he held Amy in a loving embrace.

The hedgehogs drifted to sleep, during which all the food they ate slowly converted into fat.
111131211111.title: That was fantastic, time to leave!

1111312111111.content:
Sonic woke up in a hallway. Confused, he looked around, trying to assess the situation, then at himself.
What he saw surprised him. He was slim, even slimmer than yesterday. No sign of fat. That confirmed for him he was in a dream. Curious to see how it would unfold, he decided to follow the corridor. Soon, he reached a giant room, at the center of which stood a giant fridge.

Without thinking much, Sonic decided to open the fridge. Due to the weight of the door, he had to grab and pull it with both hands. The fridge's insides were filled with all kinds of delicious treats, like chili dogs, burgers, pizzas and Sonic's new all time favorite: double chocolate layered cheesecake.

First, he started with the burgers. Sonic unwrapped the first one and stuffed it into his mouth. The whole thing was a dream, but the taste... It was so real! It reminded him of the cheeseburger he had back at the Freedom Patties. He quickly grabbed another one from the fridge... And another one...

As he kept on binging on the beef patties encased in sugary bread, Sonic noticed he wasn't getting any fuller. This made him really excited.
"Great!" - he thought to himself. - I can eat as much as I want without consequences!"

This made him think. All his life, he was always restricting himself, but the dream helped him realize, that deep inside, he is a glutton, who could eat non stop. All that self control - but finally, in this brief moment, he could give in to his temptations without being judged.

After the burgers, Sonic moved to the milkshakes and chesecake. He thoroughly enjoyed the thick, buttery mix of chocolate and vanilla and showed no signs of stopping. He emptied the drinks one after another...

"Must... Eat... More..." - uttered Sonic with a mouth full of cake.
Next were the cheese puffs. An audible "Crunch!* *Crunch!* echoed through the room as the puffs started disappearing handful by handful in Sonic's seemingly bottomless gullet. He couldn't help himself, he just wanted to pig out and relish in the rich tastes.

Suddenly, Sonic felt a tingling sensation in his stomach. Not painful, it was actually pleasant. After a while, the tingles evolved into grumbles.

*GURGLE*

"Huh?" - a warm, fuzzy feeling hit Sonic and spread throughout his entire body.

*GLORP!*

His belly began to shake. "What is happening to me?"

*GRRGL! SLOSH!*

Then, Sonic's tummy started growing! A small bulge formed in his midsection, which just a few moments ago used to be completely flat. After the next grumble, it grew a bit bigger. Confused, Sonic put the hands on his belly. He could feel constantly rising softness and warmth between his fingers.

He was getting FAT.
Normally, he would be scared, given how much he disapproved of fatness, but here, Sonic observed and touched his growing figure. His rump ballooned up and became progressively jigglier. The slim legs were filling up with lard, from hips to toes. The strain on the swimming trunks caused the development of the full fledged, dreaded muffin tops. The rolls of fat started forming in the front, which Sonic would pinch and jiggle, grabbing a bigger roll each time.
At this point, he was chubby.
He started adjusting his trunks, but whatever space he freed, it got quickly filled up by Sonic's growing pudge. He eventually pulled out the rope tie completely.

It wasn't just the belly and the butt. Sonic noticed his arms getting meatier, fatness spreading even to his now chubby fingers. His strong, toned chest has now featured freshly forming moobs.

The sensation then stopped. Sonic examined his new body, which essentially turned into a ball of pudge. He was officially overweight, with his plump belly slightly hanging from below the waistline. He would tug it with his whole hand and watch it jiggle. The old heroic body has completely disappeared under a layer of fat.

"Why am I being so playful with this? Do I... Like...No, it's not good.. Not good at all! Being fat is bad!" - Sonic seemed to have a bit of a dilemma.

He noticed a scale materializing in front of him, the same one he had in his home. With each step he took towards it, he could feel his entire body slightly wobbling and jiggling. It was quite fu-

"NO! I am not enjoying it!" - he shouted.

After carefully placing his feet on the scale, instead of the numbers, he heard a voice: "70 kg. My goal weight!"

It was Sonic's voice.

"W-what? Goal weight? No, why would I- I don't find that attractive at all! People would laugh at me!"

"Be true to yourself, Sonic. Be the real you. Be happy." Sonic turned around and saw Amy Rose, all plumped up, just like him. She started seductively fondling and grabbing her belly rolls, which caused Sonic to blush.

"N-n-no, I..."

"Sonic..."
1111312111111.title: A dream...

choices: He gained 7 kilos. He's a chubby boy now!
He gained 14 kilos. Chunky and plump!
11113121111111.content:
Sonic opened his eyes and appeared back at Amy's place. With the yellow, morning sun beaming through the windows, he knew it was soon time to get up. He promised himself the training will start today, after all. The bed, however, was just too comfortable and he preferred to sink his head into the fluffy cotton pillow.

While lying around, he examined Ames' house. The walls in her bedroom were covered in a pink paint with red hearts imprinted everywhere without a clear pattern. On a shelf he saw a bunch of photos of them together, with Sonic clearly not looking comfortable with the hugs. But the times have changed, and so did his feelings for Amy. He should visit her more often...

Speaking of Amy, she wasn't in the bed anymore. Before he could ask himself where did she go, he caught a whiff of cheese toasts. The smell came from the kitchen. He turned his head left and saw Amy, standing in front of the dishes preparing a breakfast meal.

Sonic noticed something off about the pink hedhehog. She was wearing a different bikini and this one seemed to be of significantly larger size. Her butt... had some extra padding on it and her thigh gap disappeared. Her once petite cheeks were now bubbly and rubbing each other. Probably really soft to the touch... And these delicious love handles...

Sonic snapped back to reality, with sudden influx of stress.
"If this is what happened to Amy over night, then what did that feast do to my body?" - he shuddered.

Nervous, Sonic raised his back from the mattress and started slowly pulling the bedsheets, revealing his body...
11113121111111.title: Wake up...

choices: Let's just get the breakfast out of the way and go exercise.
111131211111111.content:
*jiggle*

His face twisted in a grimace of shame.
The sheets revealed the hedgehog's new, plumped up body. The slight paunch in front now turned into a fat roll, soft and warm to the touch. He grabbed it with two fingers and squished it around, then gave his belly a slap, resulting in a wobble. The tightness around his waistline was really noticable now, thanks to the even bigger muffin tops. The trunks now adhered to his hips, with no free space left.

Sonic examined the rest of his body. Every inch of him was now pinchable, as it got covered with a delicate layer of pudge. The most embarrassing was his round butt, the outline of which was now visible through the briefs. If someone were to see him right now, his relutation would be in ruins, or so he thought. The legs were no longer a pair of thin tubes. They widened up significantly, with most of the mass concentrating on his hips. His toned chest was gone, too. Now, it was forming a round shape, a prelude for moobs.

He was quite chubby now. Not nearly as big as in his dream, but the scale still showed an uncomfortably high number of 62 kilograms. What a binge it was that he gained 7 kilos in one day! And if it wasn't for his super quick metabolism, his shape would be more similar to Amy's. She looked at least 15 kilos bigger!

Sonic looked at himself with curiosity in the mirror. Turning around, he observed his puffed up shape and little tummy and rump jiggle. He kind of looked cute this way. Wonder what it would be like to get bigger...

"Ah, what am I thinking? There is ABSOLUTELY nothing alright about being a pig!" - Sonic immediately condtradicted his thoughts. "I really need to watch my weight right now. Gotta keep that sweet tooth in check!"

Amy entered the room holding a plate of grilled cheese sandwiches in both of her hands. "Sonikku, breakfast is ready!

The blue hedgehog's eyesight focused on Amy's plump breasts, which needed a few sized bigger bra to contain their beauty. Below the plate he noticed her tummy slightly pushing downward, shaking with each step.

"Whoa... It looks so great on her!" - Sonic never expected a diet freak like his girlfriend to ever let herself go, but now here she was, well-fed and chunky. And he loved it. He wanted to snuggle with her so bad.
111131211111111.title: He gained 7 kilos. He's a chubby boy now!

choices: I'm all yours, Amy. Feed me and make me fat.
1111312111111111.content:
"Amy. In bed. Now." - Sonic ordered.
"Huh?" - Amy was caught off guard.
"You heard me. Put that plate down and get over here. This instant."

As soon as she placed the plate of grilled sandwiches down on the bedside cabinet, Sonic got up and pulled Ames towards the bed, holding her by her back fatty rolls.

The pink hedgehog landed straight on her boyfriend. With that, the bed's wooden legs audibly cracked once again. Sonic could feel Amy's extra girth applying quite a pressure on his chest. The warmth of her half-naked body awoke his deepest desires.

He started, by giving her a solid tickle:
"Ahaha! Sonic! Not the armpits! Sto-ho-ho-p! - Amy laughed, wiggling around. As she did that, her thick thighs and soft tum-tum wobbled, exactly what Sonic expected to see.

He gently held up her face with one hand and attacked with a barrage of passionate kisses. She quickly forfeited against this relentless assault and closed her eyes, smiling. After that, he hit her with some neck nibbles.

Sonic's arms slowly moved to her voluptuous chest. He gave a solid squish and watched his hands sink deep into her F cups. Amy giggled.

Next, the midsection. He drew circles with his palms, squishing the doughy belly like a baker. He grabbed the rolls protruding forward beyond her waistline with his thumbs and index fingers. Could use a bit more fat, but she was already looking pretty nice and soft. Besides, this could be easily fixed...

Her juicy rump was a thing of beauty. Before reaching for it, he wedged his fingers underneath the string of her bikini and pinched the hips. Quite a lot of meat in there and it was only about to get better.

The time has come to conquer the mountains. He slapped his hands on the bouncy cushions and grabbed the full handfulls of the jiggling mass. His hands were not big enough to grab all of it. Even her tail has plumped up, standing tall on top of the set of lovely butt cheeks.

"Oh, my, Sonic. So you finally admit you have a thing for big girls?" - Amy asked lusciously.

"You got me." - Sonic replied with a half-smirk.

He could toss out all those BBW magazines he hid in his locker. He had a real thing now. It was out in the open. Sonic was a fat admirer and a chubby chaser, ready to make his love even bigger, figuratively and literally.

"I guessed I finally figured out what I really want" - sighed Sonic.
"So did I. I have a thing for... Chubby blue hedgies." - She grinned after grabbing his muffin top - "Do you mind getting a little bigger for me?" - she said, fluttering her eyelashes.

"S-should I?" - The mere thought of it was so hot. Him, eating what he would want all the time and becoming progressively more plump? He fantasized about growing to XXL size, not being able to fit into any of his clothes. He would imagine struggling to put anything on past the wide hips plus butt combination and watch his belly shake while trying to pull his pants up.
1111312111111111.title: Amy. In bed. Now.

choices: Sonic woke up bigger and squishier.
11113121111111111.content:
Forget the diet. It was time for his dreams to become reality. He couldn't wait to already fondle his rolls.

"I'm all yours, Amy. Feed me and make me fat." - he replied.
Funny. He thought those words would never escape his mouth just a few moments ago.

"Yess! I'm so happy to hear that, Sonic! You will make a one cute fatty!" - she said with excitement. The prospect of gaining weight was thrilling to both him and Amy.

"If you can beat my fast metabolism, that is" - Sonic added. Though honestly, it was quite beaten already. It couldn't keep up with the yesterday's tsunami of carbs, after all. But he wanted to experience what it's like to be force fed.

"Ooh, is that a challenge? Very well, I accept! I will make you so bloated you won't be able to move! Let's start by filling you up with these sandwiches!" - she grinned playfully, as she positioned herself inbetween Sonic's legs. She sat on her knees, squishing her hefty hips in the process. Sonic got a nice view of Amy's panties, partially covered by her chubby belly.

"Cmon, show me what you've got!" - he taunted her - "I can take anything you will dish out against me!".

"It's time for a counter attack!" - she exclaimed and then sent a barrage of sandwiches into her boyfriend's mouth. He chewed through them one after another with ease. A small globe popped up in his midsection.

"Ha! That's all? You gotta do better than that!" - his stomach growled, demanding more calories.

It was when Amy pulled the heavy artillery.: The syrup covered stack of pancakes, made from Vanilla's recipe. With additional extra fattening ingredients, of course. One after another, landed in Sonic's stomach, each calorie bomb doing some damage to his figure.

"It's nothing! I can do this all day!" - Sonic smirked, patting his food baby.

"Wouldn't be so sure about that! Time for my ultimate weapon: The funnel cake!" - she proudly shouted.

"Oh, no, I'm so scared! A worthy challenge for my Iron Stomach" - Sonic replied sarcastically. No way a cake could beat him.
It was when she brought a giant barrel into the room, did his smug expression change into a surprised one. Amy placed a funnel in Sonic's mouth, then tilted the barrel in his direction.

He understood now, she meant a literal funnel cake, with the liquid cake mix being stuffed into him!

The thick goop splashed against the sides of the plastic funnel and then quickly disappeared, swallowed by the blue boy. For half a minute, Amy kept pouring the barrel's contents non stop, forcing Sonic to gulp it down as fast as possible to prevent spilling. The delicious chocolatey, creamy mix was stretching him from the inside out. The whole experience was exciting for him. He observed his gut rising upwards with every second.

After that, she paused for a second to hear his reaction.

"Oof... I can handle this no problem..." - his struggle could be clearly heard. His food storage already was stretched like a balloon full of air. And there was more on the way.

"What's wrong, 'Iron Stomach'? We are just getting started!" - Amy asked and then continued on hydrating her lover.

He could barely keep up, the stream hit him with a great force, he had to swallow a mouthful after mouthful. The food baby now rose to a gargantual size, blocking the view of his legs. His insides sloshed, trying to deal with the massive influx of liquid. He patted the mattress three times to signal his surrender.

"I won!" - The pink hedgehog triumphally announced.

"Ooooooooohhhhh" - Sonic panted and placed his hands on his sore, stretched out tummy, which upon rubbing made the literal noises of a balloon. He was ready to pop.

Amy lied down next to Sonic and then gently patted his belly in order to release the pressure. "There. Your stomach needed to stretch out to fit more food. Tomorrow you will wake up nice, plump and REALLY hungry." - she whispered seductively in his ear.

It was so close, just a few more hours and the remnants of his athletic body would disappear under a fatty tissue. He could already feel the calories storing themselves in his hips and gut.
11113121111111111.title: I'm all yours, Amy. Feed me and make me fat.

111131211111111111.content:
Sonic woke up from the nap. The first thing he saw waa not his belly, but Amy Rose lying on it face down. He was definitely bigger as evidenced by how much she was burrowed within his doughy gut. The blue hedgehog experienced a lot of strain due to his swimming trunks being at their limit. The butt and the large hips wanted to to set themselves free.

Amy's arms were wrapped around him in a hug. As he inhaled and exhaled, he observed Ames' head going up and down. Cute.

In order to relieve some pressure from his midsection, Sonic wanted to pull out the rope from his briefs altogether. He moved his hands carefully towards his waist, trying not to wake up his sweetheart.

But then, all of a sudden, he felt his back being pinched. Amy had two handfuls of Sonic's back fat in her possession. She then rose up and said with a grin:

"Mmhm, you make for a wonderful pillow now, Sonikku! How do you feel?"

"Never better" - he happily squished the mountain of lard in front of him.

Amy grabbed a measuring tape to see how much her boyfriend has plumped up. She told him to stand up and wrapped the tape around his waist. She couldn't help pinching him in the process.

"Congratulations, muffin-chub! You are officially XXL now!" - she announced joyfully.

His dream was coming true. A nice, ample body with his sides spilling outwards. Even his fingers were pudgier, allowing him to grab even more tush than before. The roudness of his chest now evolved into a full fledged moobs. They were nice, bouncy and squishy. Not to mention his posterior. A nice cushion, now rivalling Amy's herself.

"I could use some bigger pants, though, they are about to burst". - Sonic said.

The troops escorted Sonic to the back exit of the hut, where he was greeted by the yelling crowd, ready for their meal. The back of the hut had a built elevation with a wooden plank attached to it. As he made his way to its end, below him he saw a cauldron full of water already heating up. The sudden sting from a grunt's spear made him fall inside.

Sonic swam back to the surface, gasping for air, with his moobs on display. He was not sinking this time thanks to his additional girth keeping him afloat. The watter was already pretty warm. He had to do something before he cooked alive.
1111312212111121.title: It was a trap, the natives kidnap fat Sonic.

choices: Let's look around the shore for a ship, perhaps?
Let's find some people who don't want to eat me and are willing to help?
11113122121111212.content:
Good thinking, his legs healed up thanks to the magical properties of the syrup, which meant Sonic could run again. He pulled his hands down and bent his knees, trying to reach for the ropes tied to his ankles. He noticed that with each tug of the rope, a little space was freed.
Eventually, he managed to slip his legs through the ties. He bounced off of the cauldron's surface and bolted right outside, smashing the gate and putting the evil tribe in a visible confusion. Sonic ran as far away as possible, rousing the sand and dust to cover up his tracks.

A minute later he had to stop and catch a breath. The extra weight made running a tiny bit difficult, he had to put more effort into maintaining his ordinary speed. He decided to lie on the ground for a bit to rest.

"Well, that was something. I've had enough 'adventures' for now. Let's find the way outta here. My friends must be worried sick!" - thought the blue big boy.

The danger was over, at least for now. He learned a valuable lesson, though - to think before acting, as he almost paid the ultimate price due to his stupidity. Twice.

"Amy is going to be so mad at me" - he then looked at his doughy, overweight body - "and will probably put me on a draconian diet for this..." - he sighed.
11113122121111212.title: Try to stretch out the rope ties on his ankles.

1111312212111122.content:
"He need help!" - said the squeaky, second voice.
"Get him out!" - urged the third, deep growl.

The tribesmen pushed some of the syrup to the side, in order to be able to approach Sonic, stuck on his fours, with his plump butt sticking out. He eas embarrassed, but they seemed to take the whole thing seriously. Sonic then saw two brown arms wrapping around his squishy abdomen, which then began to pull him backwards.

With a loud popping noise, Sonic's hands were freed, but the force at which he was being pulled caused him to collapse on one of the locals. Sonic quickly got up and apologized, but the brown squirrel girl interrupted him: "No need sorry", she laughed it off, trying to hide her blush.

The squirrels looked pretty well fed themselves. They had nothing to cover up their bodies with except for the leaf thongs, wedged between their buttcheecks. Despite the intimidating looks, expressed through green war paint all over their bodies, the look in their eyes gave out friendly vibes.

"We go see chief?" - the girl suggested.
"We no bite!" - the big one joked around.
1111312212111122.title: The natives are friendly and help the unfortuna...

choices: But maybe it's a bit too much? Ask shaman for weight loss potion?
Ask for directions and move out the next day?
11113122121111221.content:
"OK, lead the way!" - said Sonic. They seemed to have a lot of experience with these vines. Maybe they have a shaman or something that could cure his fatness?
"Yay! Let's go!" - the black haired, petite squirrel jumped, pumping her fists in the air. He seemed really thrilled to have him as a guest.

On the way to the village, he had a broken conversation with the natives, jumping from topic to topic. From what he could put together, these people had their original lands stolen from a powerful, evil god. They were exiled and left here for certain death, but the Mother Nature blessed them with a miracle. The oases sprouted out of the sand and gave them all the food they needed. They made a promise to their goddess never to take revenge for the fallen and instead be fertile and multiply to spite their oppressors.

Today happened to be the Festival of Abundance, or at least that's how the outsiders translated it from their language.
"What is this festival about?" - Sonic asked.
"You see soon" - said the raspy voiced squirrel, licking his mouth and patting his belly.

--------

"We have special guest! Sonic the Hedgehog!" - the girl exclaimed to the crowd preparing for the festival, immediately getting their attention. Seems like even in this foreign land they knew who he was from the very beginning. The entire camp surrounded the blue needlemouse, which made him uneasy, considering his figure left a lot to be desired. But then they came closer, picked him up in the air and held him on their hands, cheering loudly. The chief - a huge, dark-haired, well-built man -called by his daughter, stepped out of his hut to see what the commotion was about. He picked up his pace once he realized with whose presence he was graced.

"Hello, Sonic!"- he greeted him. - "You bigger than I thought!"

They definitely did have sense of humor. The chief explained Sonic was hailed a local hero, because he shut down the robots preparing a possible another genocide of their kind.

"Be pleasure if you join festival" - the chief asked politely.
Sonic nodded in response. He came all this way, why would he leave now? Besides, what's the worst that could happen?

------------
Night has set in. The campfire illuminated the camp. Some folks were sitting in the attic, consuming large piles of various food, while others performed the ritual pair dance to thank the goddess for her blessings. Before he knew it, he was snatched by the squirrel girl. Both of them began waving their joined hands together and stepping from left to right. The light reflected off of her smiling, puffy cheeks.

Wait, puffy? Now that he noticed, the black haired squirrel was fuller than he remembered. Her petite breats were now voluptuous, resting on her supple, round belly. As she did a full turn with her left arm up, Sonic took a peek at her thong, which hid between her pair of bulging cheeks.

This gave him a nosebleed. My goodness, she was so hot now! He already had a girlfriend back home, though, but she had no body like hers. Maybe... He could convince Amy to put on a few kilograms for him...

"Time to eat" - huffed out the girl, out of breath from the exercise.

They approached the attic, where a skinny man started drinking from a huge bowl. His friends encouraged him to finish it all off by chanting "Chug! Chug! Chug!". Despite his gut already looking ready to pop, he kept on going. After emptying the bottom, he slammed the bowl on the table and belched audibly, outdoing the noises of thunderous applauds. Shortly after, his stomach shrunk back to its original size, but only for a moment. The sloshing sounds predicted his imminent expansion. The drink coated his body in fat, layer by layer. The abs disappeared under a growing mound and rolls started to develop. After the effect subsided, he was nice and chunky, his thong barely holding on to contain his girth. He patted his doughy gut in satisfaction.

"Part of ritual" - explained the tubby girl to equally tubby Sonic - "One a year, for glory of Goddess, we eat much and get fat. We plushy and warm in cold autumn and winter."

So, that's what this was all about. Indeed, now most of the tribesmen around him possessed a rather plumptious figure. He was so fixated on that one ex-skinny guy, he didn't even notice the rest of the tribe putting on weight rapidly. Even the chief doubled in size, continously stuffed by his loving, busty wife.

"Your turn" - the big guy from the oasis pointed a finger at the hedgehog.

"N-no, I'm already too big, I-".

His protests were silenced with a slice of cooked steak put into his mouth. It was undeniably really tasty, full of juicy fat. The girl made sure he was held tightly, as she continued to feed him with the other hand, waiting for him to chew and swallow. The grease was dripping from his chin. One piece after another, Sonic felt increasingly full. "This is so right and so wrong at the same time..." - thought Sonic.

With the last slice swallowed, he hoped for a moment of relief, but then, the crowd went even louder. The bowl of golden vine syrup was placed in front of him.

"Oh, well. When in Rome, do as the Romans do". He grabbed the bowl and started pouring its contents into his gullet, to the excitement of the viewers. Despite being fully aware of the negative effects of this concoction, he did not want to upset his hosts.

The sweet nectar filled him with bliss once again, he was wishing this bowl would never end. He actually held the contents of his huge meal better than expected, his stomach must've stretched out.

After finishing the bowl, the hurrah echoed throughout the sky. For a second, he felt sick, but quickly regained his composure. Then, he heard the familliar growl in his stomach. It was happening again.

A warm feeling enveloped his body. He closed his eyes, thinking of all the pleasure the sugary treat provided him with. He put his hands on his belly, which began to swell up even further and caressed it, fingers slowly sinking deeper. He grabbed his tire of fat with his hand, released it, then grabbed again, his fold feeling more plentiful than just a moment ago.

Sonic's red swimming trunks tried to accomodate to his growing posterior, but his bubbly butt, alongside with the stomach, kept pushing further, heavily straining them. He untied the knots (with some trouble because of his fat fingers) and pulled the ropes out of the briefs for more comfort. The freed space was quickly consumed by the blobby, hungry monster his belly was becoming, so that didn't do much good. Seeing as the seams were clearly visible and threads stretched out to the max, it was clear the shorts were at their breaking point.

Then, SNAP! They burst like a dam on the sides, allowing the love handles to spill further. With his legs filling up with blubber, the individual remaining seams started popping one by one, revealing more of Sonic's rotund bottom. He chuckled and thought of it as another one of Godess' miracles, for allowing the shorts to hold out for this long.

Then, the gaining stopped. Sonic opened his eyes to greet his new ex-athlete body. His hips were half as wide as his gut which was sagging down, but had no signs of stretch marks, still bouncy and round. When stretching his meaty arms forward, his stomach sticked out to the length of his elbows. On his chest rested something that could no longer be described as moobs, more like full fledged breasts.

He was obese. But so was everyone else around, congratulating him on his feat, so he didn't feel any shame. "I could actually get used to it" - he never thought in a milion years he would say it, yet here he was.

The Festival of Abundance was a success for everyone involved.
11113122121111221.title: Ok, lead the way!

choices: Try to cut the vines with his quills.
Try to rock the vines around.
11113122121112.content:
He had a bad feeling about this. Could this be a trap of some sort, meant to render the prey immobile?
Sonic found enough willpower within himself to stop eating the sickeningly sweet goo and stand up.

As he was about to step out of the pool, he felt something wrapping around his ankle. Whatever it was, it pulled him backwards forcefully, causing him to collapse on his stomach. Pulled deeper into the syrup lake, Sonic found himself submerged for a second, before suddenly being launched in the air. Visible confusion and panic painted on his face. Hanging upside down, while being held by an unknown force, suspended above the lake does that to you.

The evil entity was about to introduce itself. Upon turming his head, the hedgehog saw all the syrup vines around the tree coming to life, then heading towards him!

The green tentacles grabbed both of Sonic's arms and legs, effectively rendering him unable to move. At least they had the courtesy of positioning him straight.

Out of nowhere, another vine appeared and with impetus shoved itself in Sonic's mouth. He noticed the circular bulges forming on the end of the vine, coming closer and closer to him. The bulges turned out to be series of pressurized syrup.

The plant rhythmically pumped the syrup down Sonic's throat. He thrashed around, trying to escape the fattening trap, but to no avail. Not even biting down the vine to stop the stream could help, the pressure at which it was pushing forward was too strong.

*GULP* *GULP* *GULP*

Sonic helplessly watched his weight spike even further. His potbelly transformed into a fatty ball with rolls developing in front. The moobs grew even bigger by the second.

He had to do something before the vines turning him into a blob.
11113122121112.title: I need to get out of here!

choices: Sonic shrunk back to normal, but with side effects...
Sonic shrunk to the overweight state.
111131221211122.content:
It was of no use. As soon as Sonic tried to swing the vines around, the grip tightened around his wrists and ankles, keeping him in place. It felt like the plant was sentient and reacted angrily to the escape attempt. The syrup started pumping even faster.

Sonic couldn't keep up. The massive piles of goop partially spilled from his mouth, all over his enormous chest. He could no longer see his feet, more and more of his view being blocked off by the growing, gelatinous pile in front of him. His briefs exploded into tiny pieces, completely exposing his body. The naked rump was the size of juicy, ripe watermelons, the belly sagged to his knees. First Sonic almost drowned in the water, now, he would drown, covered by his own fat.

A swoosh was heard in the wind. Three javelins pierced the air and landed on the vines. The plant impulsively let go of Sonic, who hit the ground with a large splash, causing an earthquake. The syrup spread out through the entire oasis, every single leaf and tree trunk got covered in the golden substance, along with Sonic's three saviors.

The half-naked, brown squirrels wiped the liquid off of their faces. At first glance, they looked like friendly tribesmen. The female one looked upset over her body paint being ruined, to which the tall and middle aged guys responded with a cackle.

But there was no time for jokes, they approached Sonic, groaning in pain.

"Can you move? - asked the petite squirrel girl.
"Not a chance! Please help me out!" - he flapped his gums, causing all of his four chins to wiggle.

Truly, his body reached the levels of obesity never seen before. He was lying face down not on the muddy lake, but his grotesquely big moobs. Even without them, he'd be unable to touch the ground, thanks to the gigantic belly, spilling in all directions. It almost felt like lying on top of a tower made out of pillows.

The savages tried turning the hedgeHOG around by pushing his ass, but their entire arms sunk into it. There was no foothold to use to move him.
"Maybe try side!" - suggested the tall squirrel.

Pressing with their shoulders, they managed to cause some movement. In a coordinated push, Sonic tilted to the side, then collapsed on the back. The raspy voiced man suggested using the momentum to roll Sonic like a ball.
"Like the spin... ball he does! Good idea, yes?"

"Rolling around at the speed of zero..." - Sonic whined, disgusted by what he has become.

It seemed like they knew of him. Of course, who wouldn't have heard of the hero of Mobius? Too bad his introduction had to look like this.

Sonic was being rolled in the direction of the village. Could they have a cure for his gargantuan size in there? Hopefully so. That kind of body was just too much.

Every single lerson, including the chief himself, stepped out of their huts to witness the giant blue blob heading in their direction. The trio halted in front of the village, leaving Sonic's head close to the ground.

There was no laughter to be heard, only genuine concern and shock. He definitely wasn't the first one to fall victim to the sugary trap.

The shaman approached Sonic and placed a vial in his mouth. "Here, you shrink now".
111131221211122.title: Try to rock the vines around.

choices: Sonic woke up back in his normal size.
Sonic woke up with a bit more pounds than average.
11113122122.content:
Sonic took the right path. The blurry, green glob in the horizon soon began to form an actual shape. It was a forest!

At this point, Sonic was limping and breathing heavily. "Just a little bit longer, you can do this!" - he commanded his bony legs, struggling to bend forward. The food was out there, he could feel it!

It was a bizarre sight, though. A forest patch in the middle of the sandy and empty land? Was this just an illusion?

Miraculously, it was not. The leaves and tree crowns provided him with a much needed protection from the sun. In front of him, there was a decent sized hut with walls built out of wooden logs. Just behind it - a small lake with crystal clear water. A perfect spot for someone to live.

Sonic crawled up to the hut with the rest of his strength. He saw a figure coming out of it, before his eyes closed shut...

--------

He woke up inside lying on a springy bed. Looking forward, he saw his legs bandaged up. They stung like heck and he was unable to move them, but at least they could get some rest. He turned his head to the right and saw a part of a corridor made out of tightly grouped twigs.

On the wall, there was a photo of two cheerful female pandas holding each other's hands. One of them had a brown hair stylized into a braid, falling on her back, the other one's - white, surprisingly - flowed straight on her shoulders, with two thick strains coming out of her forehead. The similar facial structures suggested they might be sisters.

In front of Sonic, there was a stone fireplace. Seemed out of place, given the heat on this island, but he guessed the winters here must get really cold, despite tropical temperatures in the summer. Otherwise, there would be no use for it.
Didn't seem like he was in any danger. Whoever decorated the house, made it look cozy and inviting.

Suddenly, he heard loud footsteps, coming out of the back of the hallway. The houseowner was approaching.

"Oh, you woke up! I'm so glad!" - stated the girl, relieved.

She was a white haired panda from the photo. Her shiny, black fur reflected from the sun, with large white patches on her face and belly. He noticed the other part, because the only thing hanging on her frame was a purple bikini.

And a large frame it was. In comparison to her photo self, she was way heavier. She sported a pair of ample bosoms, a fluffy tummy jiggling with the movement and wide, chunky hips to support her upper body. The oasis has spoilt her silly.

"I am Mimi." - she introduced herself - "and you must be Sonic, right? You poor thing. Don't worry, I'll get you back in shape in no time!"

Well that was a surprise. He was even known in these lands.

"I'll be back with breakfast!" - she happily announced and then turned around, seductively moving her hips as she walked away. Her butt cheeks bounced from left to right.

"Wow, that was hot" - Sonic responded in his mind. -"Wait, did I really just thought that? Am I... attracted to fat chicks?"

Mimi returned with a kettle full of piping hot goulash. She held it with oven mitts to not burn her delicate hands.

"That smells delicious!" - he started salivating.
"You're going to love it!" - she placed the kettle on the table and pulled out a spoon. After scooping a hearty piece of meat from the soup' surface, she blew on it to cool it down, then placed her other hand below the spoonful to prevent anything from dripping on the bed.
"Open wiiiide!" - she giggled innocently.
Sonic followed the order, with a smile. She placed the spoon gently on his tongue.

The burst of flavor surprised him. The rich taste of meat, the combination of herbs, the spiciness... It was heavenly! No wonder Mimi became overweight, she just couldn't get enough of her own cooking!

Sonic ate one spoonful after another, constantly licking his lips to prevent even a droplet of this delicious sauce to spill. His strength was coming back.

Before he knew it, the entire contents of the kettle were in his bloated stomach now. That was one heck of a breakfast.

"I know you're still hungry, I have some more prepared!" - Mimi got up and went back to the kitchen, taking the empty kettle with her.

Whoa, there was more? Oh, well, after what he just tried, he was excited to see what else the panda had in store.

"Here, you need to eat a lot to recover your strength." - Mimi brought a plate full of burgers. So, she had a bakery there, too? Interesting!

The chubby panda inserted the first burger slowly into the hedgehog's mouth. He took a bite and his eyes opened wide. She was a culinary virtuoso! The buttery taste of the pork patty, combined with the sweet bun amplified his cravings. Despite already being quite full, he soon found himself ravenously munching on one burger after another. Mimi was looking at the blue boy with glee.

"Ooof..." - sighed Sonic, after a satisfying meal, with his belly protruding upwards. Satisfied, full of food tightly packed inside od him, he drifted back to sleep.

"Sleep tight, hero" - she whispered, as she left the room quietly.
11113122122.title: Right.

choices: Mimi had nefarious plans for Sonic.
111131221221.content:
After a few hours nap, Sonic woke up to the sound of birds chirping outside. He looked down to see his stomach return to its original size, before his unfortunate adventure. The ribs were no longer visible and the chest became more convex. He adjusted his trunks back, which were wrapped too tightly.

He felt way better already, even his feet were healing up nicely. Still, he knew he had to rest a bit more. And honestly wouldn't mind staying here for a week, maybe even two.

The rummage from the kitchen could be heard. The plump panda then returned to the bedroom, holding a big bowl of biscuts with cream filling. Sonic reached to the bowl placed on the table and begun snacking on the sugary goodness.

"So, how did you end up here?" - Mimi asked.
"I had an accident" - Sonic replied with his mouth full of cookies. He paused to swallow them, then continued - "I was on the beach with my friends and ended up falling into the sea while windsurfing. I woke up on this island with nothing to eat for days".

"That's horrible! I'm glad you made it out okay. You will be safe here".- she was quite shocked by the story.

"Could you tell me -" - he chewed through another handful - "- how come this place is so full of wildlife and trees compared to everywhere else?"

"I was curious myself before settling in. But, the triibesmen told me, when they got forced out of their territory and ended up here, the Mother Nature blessed them with patches of fertile land, alowing them to survive and thrive. It's all magic." - Mimi explained.

"I see. Say, I saw a photo in the hallway. Who is that person next to you?" - Sonic asked.

"Oh, that is my sister, Rina. She is quite a handful. She lives in another fertile patch with other pandas pretty close from here."

"You live alone?"

"Normally, nah. It's just this part of the oasis is visible and my village is hidden behind the hill. Sometimes I check here for the unfortunate people to take care of, just like you." - she booped his nuzzle. - "I can take you there once you get well."

"Gladly" - Sonic answered, reaching for more cookies, but could only scrape an empty bowl.

"Oh, you're out of cookies? Let me get you some more" - she winked.

Did he really eat all this? He wasn't even full yet, even though he had quite a food baby inside of him. He shrugged it off. He was starving for days, of course his appetite would grow!

Mimi came back with two bowls this time, filled with all kinds of different pastries. Sonic thanked her and dug right in. He shamessly crammed his face with several cookies at once. It was so good, he couldn't stop eating!

"Good! Eat and grow strong!" - Mimi clapped her hands in delight.

Halfway in, bloated, but still hungry, the thought of this being abnormal and suspicious for him eat so much without bursting arose once more. Did she put something into these cookies?
111131221221.title: Sonic woke up back in his normal size.

choices: Convince her you don't want to be fat.
1111312212211.content:
"Something wrong? - Mimi asked, worried.
"No, it's nothing, these are delicious, thank y-BUUUURP!!"
"Haha! Now THAT's a sound of a satisfied customer!

They both had a laugh. Mimi's pure, blue eyes soothed his unease and let him now he was dealing with a genuinely good person, who just wanted to share her pastries with everyone. As for the near unsatiable hunger, he attributed it to the high sugar content of his dessert.

Sonic's stomach formed into a shape of an inflated balloon. It looked like he was about to fly away from the house at any moment. He didn't want to stop eating, though. "These cookies... Mmmmph... More..."

He finally reached the end. He put his hands on the globe in front of him, a bit in pain, but still happy and fed.

"Uuugh... I think I overdit it. Now I'll have trouble sleeping..." - uttered Sonic, with some breathing issues.

"Not if I give you a massage, c'mere, boy!" -She started petting and drawing circles with her hands on his body.

At first, Sonic was against the idea, thinking it would just cause more pain. But the panda's chubby fingers gently kneaded his wobbly, stretched mass. He found it really pleasant. First a cook and now a masseuse. Mimi was a woman of many talents.
As he burped out the air inside of him, his belly shrunk gradually, ultimately reaching the point of looking like a basketball. It's a wonder how all this food got so condensed.

"Thank you so much..." - Sonic plopped back to sleep.

-----

""Ready for dinner?, Sonic?" - he heard the voice from the kitchen. Finally, he was able to move again, the pain in his legs was gone. That was fast, he thought.

But... The Hedgy Boy felt a bit sluggish. As if the gravity was pulling him more than usual. He raised his back from the bed and felt some pressure being apllied to his.midsection. Looking down, he saw two belly rolls, squishing his navel and protruding slightly from the boxers.

"Huh? Am I... Fatter? - he asked himself, confused.

Soon he started pinching his arms, chest, tum and legs. All of them were coated in an extra layer of adipose. He grabbed the wheel on his gut and tugged it up and down, causing it to jiggle. His hips weren't spared, either. They showcased a bit more grabbability.
Muffin top. He had a muffin top on his sides now. Some considered them cute, as another way of playing with their partners, but he was not sure Ames would like them. He made them less prominent but loosening the tie knot on the swimming trunks.

"The cookies had to go somewhere, I guess." - Sonic sighed, looking at his extra chub - "Oh well, I have a fast metabolism, I'll lose it in no time".

The black panda caught a glimpse of Sonic playing with his additional pounds. Once she entered the bedroom, he got startled and immediately put his hands behind him, embarrassed.

"Thought you could use a little snack." - she said, carrying a... Plate of chili dogs? His favorites! Sonic snatched the treats from the plate and wolfed them down. They tasted exactly like Uncle Chuck's! What did she do, steal his recipe? No matter, what was most important is that he could relish in this taste for the first time in a long while. He was pigging out by shoving up to three dogs in his mouth at the same time. His gullet grew visibly with each swallow.

Mimi watched fascinated with the hedgehog's growing appetite. The sauce has splattered all over his cheeks, some landing on his chest and lap.

He was done, way too quickly. Kinda wished there was more, still, she made his wish come true.

"Oh, my, you can be such a messy piggy! -she teased Sonic, then proceeded to wipe his face with a napkin -"You can wash yourself in the bathtub. I'll get the water ready."

Sonic stepped in the tub and cleaned himself up with a sponge. His belly was sticking out above the water level. All that food made him feel sleepy again, so he decided to take a short nap, during which the chili dogs converted straight into fat.

---------

It was morning. Sonic realized he spent an entire night in the bathtub. Well, it was about time to leave.
He needed a bit more force than usual to lift himself up. Once he did, he understood why.

He was bigger than yesterday. His potbelly was jiggling, shaking off the rest of the water. Shocked, he grabbed it with both of his hands, which sank into the blubbery mass. A look in the mirror revealed his fluffier face and fresh pair of growing moobs. This is bad, he went from a speedster to a chubster.

Quick peek from the bathroom allowed him to detect where Mimi was at. From kitchen, the aroma of casserole spread into the rest of the house. Another feast in the making. Sonic couldn't shake off the feeling she was deliberately trying to make him fat. If so, she was about halfway done.
1111312212211.title: Mimi's intentions are pure.

11113122122111.content:
"I'm sorry, Mimi. You are a sweet girl, but I have an image to uphold. Can't afford to get any bigger than I already am." - the disappointment filled his face.

He tiptoed rather ungracefully, heading to the exit. Suddenly, a loud crack was heard. Sonic managed to bend one of the wood panels beneath him, curse his weight!

Mimi turned back, surprised, only to see the the pile of dust hovering in the air. Sonic already bolted out of the house.

He couldn't help but feel bad, leaving her like that. She clearly cared about him, even though she spoiled him a little bit too much in the process.

Now, the thing he had to focus on is finding the way out of this island and reuniting with his friends.

He had two paths in front of him. Now, which one would lead him to someone or something, that could get him a trip home?
11113122122111.title: Sneak out of the house.

choices: I'm sorry, I need to hurry... But I'll have some cake on the road.
11113122122112.content:
Sonic decided to confront Mimi over her "slightly overfeeding" him. The lovely panda was preparing a batch of casseroles, humming a familiar melody under her nose. Her round ears twitched with delight after taking a taste test of one of the cheesy buns. "Oooh, he's going to love it!". She squealed with excitement, shaking her thick hips and bum. The jiggle that followed through made Sonic red on his cheeks.

"Hey, Mimi, we need to talk" - Sonic started.
"Oh! - the chubby girl turned around - "Hello Sonic, had a good rest? Wow, you're looking good now!" - she scanned Sonic and noticed the extra kilograms on his frame.
"Yeah, too good. Listen, I... I really appreciate all your cooking and help, but... I'm gaining too much weight. More than I am comfortable with. As much as I hate to say it, I need to stop and go back to watching my figure. People of Mobius expect their hero to be in a top shape, you know? - he explained.
"Oh, I see..." - her face got quite sad. "...but you kind of like it, right?"
"Well, all your food was delicious, of course, but-"
"No, Sonic, I mean... The feeling of being, uh, pudgy..." - she muttered quietly in embarrassment.
"Wait, the feeling of being pudgy? Did I hear that right?"
"Y-yeah, I-mean..." - her white face turned red - "You enjoy it right? I saw you playing with your belly the other day, took a little peek. Thought it was cute..."
"Oh, you saw it... Not my proudest moment, heheh. But yeah, I guess I did. But now I'm way past pudgy point."
"I think you look good this way." - She prodded his belly, making him blush. - And deep inside, I think you do too, you are just not sure what people would think, right?".

1232.content:
Based on this drawing -> http://browse.deviantart.com/?qh=&sectio...





Cream swallowed the last bite of her carrot cake with a huge gulp and patted her enlarged and soft stomach. She hiccuped and giggled, then got up to put the plate in the sink. Cream's body truly had thickened over the past month and a half. The carrot cake she just ate was just the most recent of many cakes she had been wolfing down recently. Needless to say, the cakes were absolutely delicious, but were rather fattening should they be eaten by only one person. The effects that these carrot cakes had taken on Cream's body were obvious, as a month ago, Cream did not have such thick arms and legs, such a wide waist, or, most apparent, such a large belly. While she wasn't huge or anything scale tipping, she was certainly bigger than she was last month.

But Cream's new eating habits aren't her fault; the cakes were offered to her. One of her closest friends, Tails, had been baking these carrot cakes for her, and for her only. Over the last month and a half, Tails would stop by Cream's house and offer a carrot cake to her, and she would take it and eat it. While it is certainly a nice thing to do, what really made Cream pack on all these pounds is that his arrivals with the cakes were very common. Not daily, but rarely would any more than three days pass without Tails giving Cream cake.

Cream couldn't really say she even had a care for her recent weight gain, in fact, she hardly even knew about it. Sure she could feel it in her body and her clothes that she's getting bigger, but more often than not, she doesn't notice. Vanilla, Cream's mother, had noticed her daughter's expansion, and it wasn't until she said something about it that Cream actually knew about it. Vanilla didn't tell Cream about her weight gain to make her stop, she was simply telling her just to let her know. Vanilla wasn't really a mother that would do anything for or to her daughter to make her sad; as far as Vanilla could be concerned, her daughter's happiness was the most important thing in the world. So, Vanilla allowed Cream to continue eating Tails' carrot cakes, and as a result, the once slim and light Cream became chubby and heavy.
1232.title: Fattening gifts, chubby results

choices: Tails gives Cream a cake that was already baked
12322.content:
'I never did get to thank Tails for the cake today...' Cream thought to herself as she walked towards the front door of her house, 'He visits me all the time, I'll go visit him!'

Cream walked outside of her house and jumped, flapping her large rabbit ears. Unfortunately, she fell right back onto the ground. Confused, she tried jumping into flight again, but with the same results - she dropped like a rock. The overweight rabbit eventually gave up and sighed, then started walking instead of flying.

"I can't even fly..." Cream muttered to herself, "I couldn't have gotten that fat could I?" Cream looked down at her body and rubbed her abdomen with one hand, noticing the sort of "dome" like shape her stomach took. She poked her belly through her dress, and winced a little at how far her finger went in. To make it worse, she had eaten an entire cake just a few minutes before hand, so her stomach wasn't empty, and therefore, her finger couldn't go as far.

Cream eventually started getting a little tired. Strange, considering all the running she used to do, getting tired from walking, especially just for a few minutes, shouldn't be tiring for her at all. It was a little obvious to Cream as to why she was getting winded already - her tubby body.

Fortunately for Cream, Tails' house was just in sight. She sucked it up just a little bit more so she could reach his house, but by this point, she started to breathe heavily and sweat a little. Cream managed to make it to the front door and gave it a few knocks. Seconds later, the door was open by the very person Cream was expecting: Tails. Tails gasped and immedietly lunged at Cream to give her a hug. Tails not only loved the fact that Cream had just visited him, but he also loved the fact that her body was so soft and warm.

Tails pulled away a little so he could see Cream's face, "I'm so happy to see you, but why did you come?"

Cream's smile filled her puffy face, "I just wanted to come and say thank you for the cake for today, I never did thank you earlier."

"Oh well you're welcome sweetie- uh I mean, Cream." Tails answered. Although Tails' little stutter was pretty good at masking what he originally said, it was no use with Cream. She clearly heard him say "sweetie".

"Besides," Said Cream as she used the hug to pull Tails towards her, "You always visit me, so I just wanted to visit you for once."

"That's..." Tails' face reddened, "That's nice...come right in." Cream let go of Tails and walked right in. Tails closed the door behind them, "Make yourself feel at home."

"Thanks. So what have you been doing?" Cream asked, looking around.

"I've actually been baking more cakes for you, surprise surprise." Tails answered.

Cream turned to Tails, "Really?"

"Really. I've noticed how quick you were to eat the cake I gave you earlier today, so I figured that maybe you might have room for more cake. I was planning on giving you another cake today actually."

"Cool."

Tails walked into the kitchen and picked up a large bowl, "The cake is already baking, but here's the rest of its batter if you would like."

Cream followed Tails and took the offered bowl, "I love cake batter!" Cream squealed as she looked inside the bowl. Sure enough, the inside was covered, but not filled with, cake batter. Delicious cake batter. Cream slid her hand around the inside of the bowl so she could get as much of the battery as possible and licked it off of her hands. She moaned in joy - she hadn't had cake batter in quite a long time, and it was a taste she absolutely loved. Not as good as the carrot cakes, but pretty far up there.

"Tails," Cream started, after swallowing, "I have a question."

"Yes Cream?" Tails asked.

"Um...have I been getting fat?" Cream asked.

Tails looked at Cream, "Why?"

"Well...I jiggle, I couldn't fly - I had to walk here, and I got tired rather quickly." Cream pointed out.

Tails winced when Cream said she walked to his house, "You walked here?"

"Yes."

"Well I wouldn't be too worried about it." Tails assured as he walked towards Cream, who went back to licking the cake battery. He gave Cream's belly a light pat and slowly rubbed it, "You do look like you have been putting on some weight, but you're just a little chubby. No problem."

Cream made a verbalization of agreement as she continued to lick the bowl clean of its contents.
12322.title: Too tubby for her flight

123222.content:
"But..." Said Tails, "I happen to be on an...experiment, and I have a favor to ask you."

Cream made eye contact, "What favor?"

"Well, since you have been putting on weight, I was hoping that you would help me with this project I'm doing. It is a...sort of medicine I'm trying to make for overweight people. I'm aiming for something that would make the expansion of fat cells slower, at the very least, so the user doesn't gain weight anywhere near as fast, and would actually be able to catch up and eventually lose weight faster than he or she can gain it." The whole statement had a sort of overtone that made it sound unconvincing, but Cream bought it.

"And you want to test it on me?" Cream asked.

"Well...if you don't mind."

Cream smiled, "I'd gladly help you Tails!"

Tails sighed in relief, then scratched the back of his head, "Thanks, I really appreciate it...though if you don't mind, you're probably going to have to gain some more weight. I don't think I'll be able to achieve the results I want unless you're fatter."

Cream shrugged, "I'll do it. I just hope it'll work; I don't want to become a blob."

"If it doesn't work, I'll try everything to make you lose the weight."

"Thanks."

"Well since you've agreed to help me out on this, and since I need you to be a..."few"...pounds heavier, I have a cake that I've already baked for myself that you can have."

"Really?" Cream asked, excited to eat the delicious carrot cake.

"Yeah, I'll go get it." Tails said as he left the room. Cream looked at a couch that was beside a wall and walked to it and sat in it. The seat cushion immedietly lowered in height when the overweight rabbit rested upon it. Cream leaned back and took a decent look at her body, particularly her midsection. Even when leaning back, Cream's belly still stuck out a good two inches, and had a slight hang. Not enough to hang over the waistline, but there was a hang nonetheless. Cream softly rubbed her belly with a single hand and gave it a few pats as Tails walked back into the room with the carrot cake.

Tails placed the cake on the table which was a few feet away from Cream, "Well, dig in. Be careful to not make a mess." He punctuated his sentence with a friendly chuckle. Cream took no hesitation and certainly did dig in to the carrot cake, shoving the delicious breaded glory into her mouth, and ravenously sending it down her throat and into the pit that was known as her stomach.

While this was a rather terrible display of eating habits compared to what Cream would normally do, the carrot cakes were the only things that Vanilla would allow Cream to, for lack of a better word, "attack". Since Cream enjoys them so much, it seemed logical to let her enjoy them as much as she could, while still keeping her regular eating habits in check. Cream would generally eat these cakes on her own terms, as they would almost never serve as a part of the three-square-meal pattern, unless they were saved for desert.

Tails watched as Cream ate and ate and ate the cake. This sight caused the fox to smile, because it represented multiple conclusions: 1, considering Cream had already eaten a cake barely even an hour ago, that means that she might be able to stomach two cakes at once, 2, it certainly proved that Cream either loved the carrot cakes, or had become enthusiastic about gaining weight due to Tails' story, and 3, it just went to show just how quickly Cream will enlarge.

The cake wasn't necessarily big, so it didn't take Cream long to finish it. She rubbed her stomach with both hands then looked at Tails with her cake covered face, "I just thought about it..."

"What?" Tails asked, grabbing a tissue box. He walked to Cream and handed her a tissue, which she used to wipe the cake off of her face.

"Having you been baking these cakes to make me gain weight for your experiment?" Cream asked.

Tails was tongue tied for a brief moment, but he came up with his answer, "Not really. I've been working on this project for a while, and I kinda just wanted to give you a gift really. I know how much you love carrots, so I thought a carrot cake would be a good idea, and since you loved the cake so much, I just decided to bake more and more for you. It was just coincidence."

Cream continued to slowly rub her belly. Tails eyed her belly for a brief moment and asked, "May I join you?" When Cream made a confused face at him, Tails moved his hands in a gesture that implied rubbing.

Cream...

choices: Fast forward to Tails' next visit the next day
1232221.content:
Cream smiled, "Do you want to rub my belly?"

Tails nodded and motioned towards Cream, placing his hand on the squishy mound. He then moved his hand across the belly, feeling its warm softness through Cream's dress. He gave her belly a quick slap, which, while it didn't hurt, sent a jiggle across the entire belly. Tails felt a little awkward, but rather happy, as there was one thought he couldn't get out of his head.

'She's gonna be so delicious.' Tails' subconscience thought. Tails' conscience kicked it and thought, 'NO! That's Cream! My friend!'

Tails tried his best to ignore both of these thoughts as he rubbed Cream's belly, but his subconscience got the better of him, "Would you like more food Cream?"

"I'm not hungry right now." Cream answered, "Besides, I like having my belly rubbed. So soothing." Tails grinned and pinched Cream's belly.

"Hey!" Cream protested. This only unintentionally prompted Tails to grab her belly and shake it violently. After giggling and jiggling for a bit, Cream got up and shoved her belly into Tails' body, knocking him down to the floor.

Cream gasped, "Are you ok?!"

Tails laughed and quickly got back on his feet, "Do that again!"

Cream grinned and did as she was asked. Much like before, she shoved her belly right into Tails' torso and, much like before, knocked him down. This time however, Tails didn't get up; he was too busy laughing. Cream offered her hand to help Tails back on his feet. Tails grabbed Cream's hand as she pulled him back to his feet.

"That was so funny, I didn't expect that the first time at all!" Tails exclaimed.

Cream giggled, "Surprised you, didn't I."

"Oh I got a surprise for you, come with me." Said Tails as he walked to his kitchen towards the fridge. Cream immedietly followed him. Tails opened the door to his fridge and gestured towards the inside of it, "Take a look at this."

Cream peered into the fridge. Tails backed away to give her more room. Tails walked behind her without being noticed and shoved his hands onto her sides, just above the waist, tickling her. Cream then jolted and started bursting with uncontrolled laughter and shaking as Tails continued to tickle her.

Tails then released Cream of her ticklish vassalation and her laughter died down. Cream looked at Tails.

"You little...How did you know I was ticklish?" Cream asked.

Tails shrugged, "I didn't, but I surprised you didn't I?"

Cream nodded, "How long will it be until your experiment is ready for me?"

"It's ready actually." Said Tails, "It's just that you need to be a bit fatter. You can clearly see, I have plenty of food in this house that I don't even eat, and a lot of it are cakes meant for you. I was actually considering making some brownies for you to have within the next few days."

"Really?!" Cream asked.

"Yeah, but seriously though, if you think you'll need help to gain the weight I need you to gain, just give me a visit. I'll bake stuff for you that'll fatten you up. What about your mom though? Does she make fattening food?"

Cream shook her head, "If she did, I think I would have been this big a long time ago. I'll talk to her about it and see what she can do."

"Sweet." Said Tails, "Thanks again by the way."

"No problem." Said Cream, "I gotta go, but do have anything I can eat on the way back home?"

Tails reached to the top of his fridge and pulled down a bag of potato chips, "Not much, but it'll hold you until you get him right?"

"Maybe." Cream half-agreed, taking the bag, "But since I'll have to walk, these things might make me put on...maybe half a pound."

"At best." Tails agreed.

"I'll see you tomorrow?" Cream asked, heading towards the door.

"I'll pay you a visit. I'll try to bring more cake while I'm at it." Said Tails.
